_comment: Project-level Claude Code config for the agency repo. Authored by Task 094 ST-2 per docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/settings. The .claude/skills/ symlink points at ../skills/ so all 54 imported skills (39 sc-* + 15 superpowers-*) plus the in-repo non-imported skills load at SessionStart. ADR-0011 D.7 forbids SessionStart-hook injection; Task 094 ST-3 will populate the hooks block with 5 D.7-compliant event hooks (UserPromptSubmit / PreToolUse / PostToolUse / Stop / SubagentStop). Pre-ST-3 the block is intentionally empty.
